name: granola-cli
description: Native OpenClaw marketplace catalog for the granola plugin while it lives in this repo. Distinct from .claude-plugin/marketplace.json so OpenClaw resolves it through the native code path, not the Claude-bundle compat layer.

plugins.name: granola
plugins.description: Auto-loads the granola skill into OpenClaw agent bootstrap so agents can read meeting notes, transcripts, and folders from Granola.ai via the granola CLI. Setup script verifies the granola host CLI is installed and GRANOLA_API_KEY is reachable.
